violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Ambient temperature of the 2-door reach-in was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Dressing observed with a temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Service call placed during inspection. Temperature was adjusted and ambient temperature observed at 41 degrees F at the end of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed to have an accumulation of black residue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
